violations.text: Incense holder was observed on the hand-washing sink located next to 3-bay sink area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC relocated incense holder at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The front door to the outside of establishment is not tight-fitting. Observed weather strip missing/needs adjustment. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

Observed cat walking around establishment floor and on cash register counter. Cat litter box observed located underneath 3-bay sink. PIC removed cat litter box and cat from the establishment at time of inspection. PIC advised that live animals may not be allowed on premises of food establishment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The ice tube connection attached to the (soda machine) was not in good repair. Observed water pooling in back storage area. Per interview with PIC owner has purchased new tubing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine/bleach) sanitizing solution for the (3-bay sink). New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The dumpster enclosure had an accumulation of clutter. Observed dumpster opened and an accumulation of clutter. -A storage area and enclosure for REFUSE, recyclables, or returnables shall be maintained free of unnecessary items and clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

Observed unused equipment (refrigerator and freezer) and shelving located in 3-bay sink area/back storage. The PREMISES shall be free of: Items that are unnecessary to the operation or maintenance of the establishment such as EQUIPMENT that is nonfunctional or no longer used; and litter. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
The dumpster enclosure had an accumulation of clutter. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024
Two hand sinks were lacking paper towel. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
There was no sanitizer at 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
There were an accumulation of dead/trapped insects on glue boards throughout storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
There was a leak under the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
The dumpster enclosure had an accumulation of clutter. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
The dumpster was lacking a drain plug. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
Lights were lacking a light shield/cover. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
